title: Mixed Wool Bed
description: Craft a bed with mixed wool colors
body:
### Any combination of wool colors that are not all the same color will result in a white bed, instead of nothing
![Crafting Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f857791d40fac39e49405dc497c8a9065b5a28a.png)


I just changed recipes/white_bed.json to have "tag: minecraft:wool" instead of white wool item only
